{{Dialogue|Drall server|Something for you, gentles, to begin?|Mara Jade Skywalker|Elba water.|Anakin Solo|Two.|attr=Mara Jade Skywalker and Anakin Solo order elba water|src=<ref name="NJO">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref>}}
'''Elba water''' was a refreshing beverage that was served at the [[Happy's Landing]] [[Ale/Legends|ale]] house on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] and the [[Leafy Green]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was enjoyed by [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin]], [[Sprig Cheever]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], and [[Anakin Solo]]. At least one [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunter]] uncovered a flask of elba water during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
Elba [[Water/Legends|water]] was a refreshing liquid that was [[Color/Legends|aqua-colored]] in appearance.<ref name="AED">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>

==History==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] heiress [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin]] spent a few [[credit token]]s on a cold glass of elba water at [[Happy's Landing]], an [[Ale/Legends|ale]] house on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]]. [[Sprig Cheever]], the mate of of [[Twilit Hearth]], also had a glass of elba water at the same establishment.<ref name="Tinian">{{JournalCite|4|Tinian on Trial}}</ref>

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars Galaxies}}
During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]<ref name="AED" /> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> at least one [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunter]] uncovered a buried container that held a flask of elba water.<ref name="AED" />
{{Endgame}}

In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],<ref name="TERC" /> [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Anakin Solo]] visited the [[Leafy Green]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where they were each served an elba water by a young [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] [[Waiter/Legends|server]].<ref name="NJO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Elba water first appeared in "[[Tinian on Trial]]," a short story written by [[Kathy Tyers]] that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] by [[West End Games]] on [[November 1]], [[1994]].<ref name="Tinian" /> [[W:c:swg:Flask of Elba Water|Elba water]] later appeared as a [[W:c:swg:Drink|drink]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="AED" /><ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> With the release of [[W:c:swg:Chapter 6 Notes for May 22 2007|Chapter 6: Masters of the Wild]] on [[May 22]], [[2007]], the [[W:c:swg:Star Wars Galaxies|game's]] [[W:c:swg:Buried Treasure|treasure hunting]] system was updated.<ref name="Chapter6">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=66959&resource=publish#chapter6|text=Chapter 6: Masters of the Wild}}</ref> As part of this system, elba water was included as a consumable [[W:c:swg:Buff|buff]] [[W:c:swg:Item|item]] which could be found in buried treasure containers. The item, when consumed, gave the player a small boost to their [[W:c:swg:Block Value|block]] abilities.<ref name="AED" />
